---
title: "Home"
site: workflowr::wflow_site
output:
  workflowr::wflow_html:
    toc: false
editor_options:
  chunk_output_type: console
---

BIO334 Practical Bioinformatics — University of Zurich, Spring 2026.

| Block | Dates | Topics |
|-------|-------|--------|
| [von Mering](von_mering.html) | May 7, 8, 12 | Python basics, multiple sequence alignment, NJ trees |
| [Wagner](wagner.html) | May 13, 15, 19 | Fitness landscapes, DHFR data, igraph |
| [Shimizu](shimizu.html) | May 20, 21, 22 | Nucleotide diversity, GFF annotation, Tajima's D |
| [Robinson](robinson.html) | May 22 onward | TBD |
